episodes.title: The Case of Cult Abuse in Stargard, Poland: Why Ritual Abuse Isn't Just an 'Elite Problem'
episodes.description:
Iain Bryson, author of "I Love You Like One: A Letter To My Daughter, Abducted By A Cult," discusses it's not just the elite who are trafficking children and perpetrating Satanic Ritual Abuse; it is the poor and the rich and everyone in between. It's not everyone who is doing it, but it is happening everywhere. Iain dives deeper into the cult abduction of his daughter by a family in Stargard, Poland, that is not a part of the world elite. 

Website: https://www.iloveyoulikeone.com/

Email: iloveyoulikeone@gmail.com 

TRANCE Formation of America by Cathy O'Brien: https://amazon.com/dp/B0BHBRS92V 

Quest for Love by Anneke Lucas: https://amazon.com/dp/B0B4FV3982

Only God Rescued Me by Lisa Meister: https://amzn.to/4rrDUGj

episodes.title: Iain Avery Bryson, father of the child abducted by the cult - Part 2 of Interview  Olga Kharitonova
episodes.description:
Link to Original Video: https://rumble.com/v770l2q-iain-avery-bryson-father-of-the-child-abducted-by-the-cult..html

Link to Olga's Page: https://www.olgakharitonova.su/

RUS/ENG

Несмотря на то, что информация об оккультной структуре нашего мира постепенно выходит из тени, существует твëрдо укоренившаяся иллюзия, что оккультный мир - это "где-то там" и имеет отношение лишь к так называемой "элите".

Iain Avery Brison, отец похищенного в культ ребёнка - провёл 50 месяцев в тюремно-псхиатрическом заключении на одном лишь основании своего заявления о ритуальном насилии в отношении своей дочери.

Первая жена, принадлежащая семье культа и мать ребëнка Иена не имела отношения к "элите".

Это была соседка, с которой он познакомился в своëм обычном районе.

Дорогой Иен, Огромная Благодарность за всё.

Наша задача сказать, а не заставлять верить.

Despite the fact that information about the occult structure of our world is gradually emerging from the shadows, there is a firmly rooted illusion that the occult world is “somewhere there” and is related only to the so-called “elite”.

Iain Avery Brison, the father of a child abducted into a cult, spent 50 months in prison and a psychiatric hospital based solely on his allegations of ritual abuse against his daughter. His first wife, a member of the cult family and the mother of Iain's child, was not part of the "elite."

She was a neighbor he met in his very ordinary neighborhood.

Dear Iain, Huge Gratitude for everything.

Our job is to say, not to make to believe.
